info.title: Social Media API
info.description: Professional REST API documentation for the Social Media Backend. Supports authentication, posts, comments, stories, notifications, real-time messaging, and more.

results.description: Number of results in this page

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page (cursor-based pagination)

message.example: Please provide a valid email address

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid JWT token

example.message: Invalid token. Please log in again.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User profiles, follow system, and settings

tags.name: Feed
tags.description: Personalized feed, trending, and nearby posts

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: User login, registration, and security settings

tags.name: Insights
tags.description: Echo Chamber detector, viral leaderboard, and content analytics

tags.name: Privacy
tags.description: GDPR-compliant privacy audit logs — see who viewed your profile and posts

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Register external URLs to receive real-time event notifications

get.description: Retrieve general statistics about users, posts, and system status (Requires Admin/Moderator role).

200.description: A successful response containing the stats.
Successfully logged out from all devices

post.summary: Add a text comment to a post
Add an audio comment to a post

get.summary: Get generated transcription of audio comment

patch.summary: Adjust playback speed settings for audio

get.summary: Get posts submitted from nearby location
Get post suggestions based on interactions
Get overall API status and environment info
Analyze your content diversity (Echo Chamber Detection)
get.description: Uses Shannon Entropy on your last 30 days of interactions to score how diverse your content consumption is (0 = pure echo chamber, 100 = perfectly diverse).

200.description: Daily diversity ratios over the period

get.summary: Get the most viral posts on the platform
Get conversation history with specific user

200.description: Successfully marked the alert as read

patch.summary: Mark all unread notifications as read
Update notification categories and delivery preferences

media.description: Up to 10 media files (images or videos)

get.summary: Get a specific post by ID
Get viral coefficient (K-factor) and reach stats for a post

200.description: Viral stats including K-factor, total reach, share depth

get.summary: Get the share propagation tree for a post

200.description: Share tree with reshares and their engagement

get.summary: List my sealed time capsule posts

200.description: List of pending capsule posts with reveal dates

post.summary: Seal a post as a time capsule
post.description: The post will be hidden until the revealAt date, then automatically published.

delete.summary: Cancel (unseal) a time capsule before reveal

get.description: See all events related to your data — profile views, post views, search appearances. Non-followers are shown as anonymous.

delete.summary: Delete all your privacy logs (GDPR right to erasure)

get.summary: Get profile view analytics for the past 30 days

200.description: Total views + daily breakdown chart data

get.summary: Weekly summary of privacy events by type

200.description: Count per event type for last 7 days

get.summary: Get the authenticated user's sticker collection
Get a single sticker by ID

post.summary: Toggle sticker in/out of user's personal collection

patch.summary: Flag or unflag sticker as offensive (Admin only)

get.summary: Get stories feed from followed accounts
View the stories belonging to an exact user

200.description: Add self implicitly to viewer list

post.summary: Send a fast reaction to a story

200.description: Sent an emoji or emotion action properly

post.summary: Convert story to an archived highlight section

200.description: Story properly stored on profile unconditionally

delete.summary: Delete a story artifact before global exit logic runs

get.summary: Get current logged in user details
Get saved posts for current user

200.description: A list of users matching query

get.summary: Get users followed by a user

201.description: Webhook registered. Secret shown only once.

post.summary: Send a test delivery to a webhook URL
